pageContext.name: Howard the Duck Qreature
pageContext.description: No One Laughs at a Master of Quack-Fu!  Born on Duckworld, Marvel's Howard the Duck is from a planet where all intelligent life evolved from waterfowl. Duckworld resembles mankind's Earth in so many ways that when a power-hungry demon transported Howard to Florida, he thought he was still home. Well, until he saw all the hairless apes walking around.   This 11-inch tall Howard the Duck Qreature™ features his signature red three-piece suit and matching rumpled hat. Like all of our Qreatures™, Howard the Duck is a sculptural, stylized plush. He's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold his shape even while confronting Doctor Angst and the Band of the Bland with his deadly Quack-Fu martial arts.  Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
